{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7406986462972740414","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的文呀怎么没人呀！！！！[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724577428,"group_id":"7404701352107985945","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生于忧患，死于安乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+5pzNBcpBFDZO0XisFGMZ/AGAUi+WEV+pbLUcGzJw1+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b96ca9b003d64c0fb910548cc4490996~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616988&x-signature=fgptpa3bBsNBbmSjAkn%2BBgTeBYA%3D","user_id":"4174174624941512","user_name":"嗑cp好快乐～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4174174624941512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404701352107985945","book_info":{"abstract":"简介部分:
到底需要达到什么样的境界，才算是成仙得道。
是该高高在上，漠视众生？
是该胸怀天下，包容万象？
还是该杀伐果断，恩怨分明？
亦或是该肆无忌惮，随心所欲？
他自幼熟读《仙门策》，却始终不知自己修炼的成仙之道是否正确。
更雪上加霜的是，他还没来得及确定答案，就已经先被那个可恶的邪门歪道给拐回家去了。
本文品尝说明书：
1.这就是个信心满满去当内奸却直接变成了内人的美好故事。
2.温溯X楚归星。
3.1V1，HE，我从不写悲剧，放心吧。
4.如果各位觉得有些角色三观不正，请不要为此怀疑作者三观，这都是为了剧情推动，不代表我就是这么想的，这一点请牢记，么么哒。！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d83011b9f204c1f4321f0397a419a74e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"唯我妖魔","author_id":"","book_id":"7404701352107985945","book_name":"为仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7404924200864992281","read_count":"12","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"722176"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"342","tags":"双男主,古代,甜宠,HE,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d83011b9f204c1f4321f0397a419a74e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259732&x-signature=bVlNEeiDrE4eSkqoM%2BIo2Z7grmQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2531,"reply_count":0,
